text:
On Sun, 15 Jun 2008 12:15:53 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of science/gramps,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/124601 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/124601
>=20

An update to version 3.0.1 are coming real soon!

--=20

Linux: "Where do you want to go tomorrow?"
FreeBSD: "Are you guys coming, or what?"
